prompt: Looking at the trello-openapi.json spec, I need to generate a Swift model struct for the Label schema. It should follow the same patterns as the existing models in this project — conforming to Codable, Sendable, Equatable, with an init that has default nil values for optional fields. Also generate a corresponding endpoint method and basic tests.

assertions.text: Label struct conforms to Codable, Sendable, and Equatable
The 'id' field is a non-optional String (let id: String)
Other properties like name, color are optional (String?)
Has a public init with default nil values for optional parameters
LabelsAPI.swift has a TrelloClient extension with at least one label-related method
Tests use Swift Testing framework (@Test, #expect or #require)
Model properties match the actual Label schema fields from the OpenAPI spec
